dialogos.texto_en: Wooow! Is this Umikaji Terrace?
The buildings are all white!
This atmosphere is similar to Europe,\nor maybe the Mediterranean coast.
The sea is beautiful too...
This is such a stylish place! How nice!\nJust being here puts me in a good mood.
Yeah, this resort vibe\nis definitely getting me excited!
I had no idea there was such a place.
I think this is a relatively new facility.\nI found it while planning for this trip.
It's quite an unconventional tourist spot to visit as our first stop.
Well, I didn't want to disappoint you\nwith a typical plan that would make you say,\n'Oh, that's ordinary.'
Also, I thought it was a really nice place\nfrom the moment I saw the photos...\nI definitely wanted to come here.
What kind of place is this?
There are many kinds of shops here.\nYou can enjoy leisurely shopping,\nand there are also Okinawan sweets!
The scenery is so nice that \njust walking around looks fun.
However, let's have brunch first!\nThis place also has a variety of restaurants.
Ah, that's exactly why I had a light breakfast.
I'm okay with that.\nWhat should we eat?
Leave the menu to me!\nI did some research on Okinawan cuisine\nbefore coming here.
I made sure to memorize the restaurants here.
You really value substance over style, huh, Itsuki?
Ahaha... Not to that degree....
I think it's fine, isn't it?\nEnjoying the local food culture\nis also one of the highlights of travel, isn't it?
Yeah, you're right!\nYou can enjoy the food as much as the sights when traveling!
...I'm not sure I'd put them both on the same level.
So, first of all!!\nWhat I want to teach you\nis about Okinawa's steak culture.
It suddenly feels like we're in a classroom.
Steak in Okinawa?\nI can't really imagine that.
Actually, there are many steak restaurants in Okinawa.\nThey were influenced by American culture, you know.
Moreover, it seems that Okinawa's steak\nis a little different from the steak we usually eat%p-2;――
Surprisingly, there's a unique Okinawan steak sauce, too!
Oh, I had no idea about that either.
Wait a minute. I have a bad feeling about this...\nThe fact that you suddenly started talking about steak must mean%p-2;――
Yup, we're going to a steak restaurant!
Oh no... I knew it...
Steak for brunch is a bit heavy...
And it seems a little too luxurious...
That's what you're worried about?
Putting luxury aside,\nisn't steak usually eaten for dinner?
Th-that's not true!\nBrunch steak is delicious too,\nI'm sure of it!
We're going to be walking around all day today, \nso I think it's not a bad idea to eat\na proper meal while we're here.
We'll definitely use up the calories we consume.
Why is it that you guys don't hesitate when you eat \nanything sweet but at times like this, \nyou all start talking about calories?
Big brooo! You're not supposed to say things like that!
Well, anyway, setting calories aside.\nI'm okay with steak.
I mean, it seems like you're totally gung-ho on steak,\nItsuki.
Uuuh...
Fine, fine. Steak it is.
I'm leaving all aspects of this plan up to Itsuki,\nso I won't complain.
Thank you very much!
Oh, the photos of the menu items\nlook so delicious!\nI can't decide which one to choose!
I'll go with something lighter.
Me too.
Ehhh, but this is our chance to eat steak, you know?
I'm going all out!
(Kkh! Authentic steaks are pretty expensive!\nThey're more than twice the cost of\nsteaks at family restaurants!)
(Considering the budget for the remaining\n days of the trip and Raiha's portion...\n I wonder if we're cutting it close? In the red?)
Is something wrong?
Ah, no, it's just that...\nI was thinking that top quality stuff can add up.
...Oh, is that it?
Don't worry about that. I'll take care of the payment.
What the%p-2;――
Otherwise, you might end up ordering a\nsteak set without the steak, Uesugi-kun.
I wouldn't do that, especially while on vacation!\nI'll pay for it myself!
Naturally, it's a little embarrassing for a boy \nto ask his girlfriend to pay for him, right?
It's not embarrassing or anything, it's just%p-2;――
That's right, Uesugi-kun!\nPlease, treat me this time!
Huh?
WHAAA?!\nWh-why do I have to do that?!
Well, I mean...
N-no reason! Just because!
W-woah, Itsuki-chan?
I mean, well, I'm sorry, but that's just not possible.\nI'll be paying for myself and Raiha's portion, too.
I-if you're not treating me, then at least let me treat you!\nIt should be fine if I pay, right?!
What are you talking about?\nEach of us can just pay for our own meal\nlike normal people.
But if we do that, then, um...
I-it's decided!\nWe're going as a pair, Uesugi-kun!\nEither I pay, or you pay!
What exactly is your end game here?!
Haah... Haah...\nAlright, so each person\ncan pay for their own portion, okay?
Understood, so then...
Is everything settled now?
Yes...\nSorry for making such a fuss.
No, it's my bad.\nIf I could've treated you,\nthere wouldn't have been a problem.
B-but, I'm the one who asked\nwithout considering your circumstances!\nYou don't have to apologize%p-2;――
Stop, before you get into another loop.
Ah... Sorry...
I'm sorry too.\nI mispoke earlier.
No, it's my fault...
Well, anyway, let's just go inside\nand eat at the restaurant.\nIt smells really good, and I'm getting hungry!
Okay...
(*sigh*\n Why did Itsuki have to bring all that up anyway?)
